description:
Designer & management software for xTool laser cutters & engravers.


1. XCS Upgrade! The brand-new xTool Studio client is live — easier design, smoother processing, more comprehensive features, and a seamless creative experience. (Installing Studio will not overwrite XCS.)
2. Massive fonts & assets library, plus uploads supported.
3. Smarter images: auto-adjust, improved filters, 3 AI tools.
4. Boost productivity with smart templates & project generator.
5. Revamped material library with usage tips.
6. Cloud-synced parameters linked to materials.
7. Processing preview with simulation & smart detection.
8. MetalFab supports engraving: The new combined processing mode supports engraving processing.
